categories.title: ANSWERS ENDING IN -ISM
categories.theme: Every answer ends in the letters -ISM

clues.clue: This art movement, pioneered by Claude Monet, focused on capturing fleeting light and color in everyday scenes.
Pablo Picasso's 'Les Demoiselles d'Avignon' is a landmark work of this art movement, which employed fragmented, multiple-viewpoint imagery.
René Magritte's 'The Son of Man' belongs to this art movement, known for its dreamlike, irrational imagery.
This term, ending in -ism, describes the error of placing something in the wrong historical time period.
Piet Mondrian, known for his bold grids and primary colors, was a leading figure of this Dutch abstract art movement.
